creator: software@bertram-scharpf.de
text:
I reported a bug in the ports directory over two months ago
including a two-line fix. The bug report could be closed in
about three minutes.

Yet, I got no answer at all.

This is a slap into the face of everyone who wants to contribute.

Yes, I know what your answer will be: You all just don't have the time.
Of course you don't have the time as long as you treat people that
try to contribute this way.

Your behaviour is nothing less than a bold insult.
